# devbrain redact corpus — inputs only. The Go `redact` package is the source of
# truth; the golden is its exact output (regenerate by running Redact over this).
# The first section's shapes still match the legacy devbrain_lib.py table; env +
# bare-vendor sections below are Go-only additions.
# Near-miss lines MUST pass through unchanged (over-redaction is drift too).

-- openai-style sk- keys --
plain: sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwx
exact-20-after-prefix: sk-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
near-miss-19-after-prefix: sk-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
with-dashes-underscores: sk-proj-AbC123_def-456ghi789jkl
mid-sentence the key sk-ZYXWVUTSRQPONMLKJIHGFE ends here.
quoted: "sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwx"
json: {"api_key": "sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwx", "other": 1}
url: https://example.com/?key=sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwx&x=1
two on one line: sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwx and sk-zzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz
prefix-only: sk- (nothing after)
unicode neighbor: héllo sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwx wörld

-- github tokens gh[pousr]_ --
ghp: ghp_abcdefghij1234567890
gho: gho_abcdefghij1234567890
ghu: ghu_abcdefghij1234567890
ghs: ghs_abcdefghij1234567890
ghr: ghr_abcdefghij1234567890
near-miss-ghx: ghx_abcdefghij1234567890
near-miss-19: ghp_abcdefghij123456789
in-env: export GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_ABCdefGHIjkl0123456789
github_pat long: github_pat_11ABCDEFG0abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz
github_pat near-miss short: github_pat_11ABCDEFG0abcdefghi

-- AWS access keys --
akia: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
asia: ASIAJEXAMPLEKEY12345
near-miss-lowercase: akiaiosfodnn7example
near-miss-15: AKIAIOSFODNN7EX
inside arn-ish text key=AKIA0123456789ABCDEF secret follows

-- slack tokens xox[baprs]- --
xoxb: xoxb-1234567890-abcdef
xoxa: xoxa-abcdefghij123
xoxp: xoxp-1111111111-2222
xoxr: xoxr-abcdefghijk
xoxs: xoxs-0123456789a
near-miss-xoxz: xoxz-1234567890-abcdef
near-miss-9-after: xoxb-123456789

-- bearer tokens --
auth header: Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.payload
short near-miss: Bearer abc123
exact-16: Bearer aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
lowercase near-miss: bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9
dots-dashes: Bearer a.b-c_d1234567890xyz

-- mixed / adversarial --
sentence with ghp_abcdefghij1234567890 and AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE and xoxb-1234567890-abcdef together
markdown `sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwx` in backticks
skill mention: task-notification about sk-ANT keys in general
plain prose mentioning Bearer tokens without a value
a URL https://api.slack.com/xoxb-docs (near miss: no digit run)
trailing newline behavior test line

-- env-file assignments (generic name rule; values redacted whole) --
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwx
FIRECRAWL_API_KEY=fc-2d64d8b4e8f34568bd6a997f8e2c9937
PERPLEXITY_API_KEY=pplx-TfktUXxpXADNMjNXYJjrX2aW3998mAV1

DB_PASSWORD="correct horse battery staple"
  export INDENTED_TOKEN=abcdef0123456789

-- PEM private-key blob (multi-line) --

b3BlbnNzaC1rZXktdjEAAAAABG5vbmUAAAAEbm9uZQAAAAAAAAABAAAAMwAAAAtzc2gt
ZWQyNTUxOQAAACDexampleexampleexampleexampleexampleexampleexampleAAAA

-- env near-misses (must pass through unchanged) --

MONKEY_BUSINESS=notasecretbutlongvalue
KEYBOARD_LAYOUT=qwertyuiop
SHORT_KEY=abc
lowercase in-prose api_key=notredacted123456 stays

-- bare vendor tokens (no sk- hyphen) --
sanity: sknALo68XvD23b27aP2viH6B4gjK2ikuoIY4UmRAmK0qLD8Jg
vercel: vcp_3LuFyZZOtAP8OAPOtqdf3lv3R9tooAl2
